substrate_gap_chapter_section_mapping.069r1_substrate_gap_description: explicit (a_0, a_1, a_2) -> (alpha_inf, alpha_0, beta_inf, beta_0) chart-map for CT v1.3 sec 3.5 4-tuple = (1/6, 0, 0, -1/2)
substrate_gap_chapter_section_mapping.expected_jm81_filler_section: Part II Lax-pair / tau-function section; possibly Part I framework chapter for general theory (3-author Ueno contribution)
substrate_gap_chapter_section_mapping.prior_finding_substance: BLMP 2024 sec 4.1 transitive readback of JM81 II core convention indicates 2-parameter (Theta_0, Theta_inf) labeling with map Theta_0 = alpha/4, Theta_inf = 1 - beta/4 (BLMP eq 4.6); cardinality-2 NOT cardinality-4. CT v1.3 sec 3.5 4-tuple is NOT structurally derivable from JM81 II core convention (provisional, pending RIMS Kyoto ILL primary-source verification).
substrate_gap_chapter_section_mapping.implication_for_069r2: Acquisition of JM81 II is unlikely to fill the chart-map substrate gap unless an extension / sub-case in JM81 II Lax-pair section introduces additional 4-parameter labeling not surfaced by the BLMP transitive reading. Probability low-to-moderate.
